title: Reports and Publications - About Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Reports and Publications - About Health Canada
In alignment with the Government of Canada’s Greening Government Strategy and our ongoing shift to digital, we will be transitioning to a print-on-demand model. All publications remain available online at Canada.ca.
Health Canada produces numerous reports and publications about the Canadian health care system and issues that affect the health of Canadians.
In this section, you'll find reports and publications related to topics found within the About Health Canada section. On this page, you can also access health-related reports and publications from other sections of the Health Canada Web site .
- Access to Information and Privacy
- Federal Tobacco Control Strategy - International Component
- Food and Drugs Act Liaison Office
- Government On-Line Initiative
- Grants & Contributions
- Health Products and Food Branch

- Office of Consumer and Public Involvement

- Regulatory Transparency and Openness Framework
- Supervised Injection Sites
- Sustainable Development

- Reports and Publications from Other Sections of the Health Canada Website

The Access to Information and Privacy Division reports to Parliament annually on Health Canada's administration of the Access to Information Act and the Privacy Act. If you are interested in obtaining a copy of a past report contact the Access to Information and Privacy Division .
